strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack and distributed-systems experience across fintech-adjacent domains
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or holding executive/CTO-level leadership roles
Limited evidence of production multi-agent AI systems in regulated, high-stakes commercial environments
Fintech exposure is narrow (RIDE Capital ~1 year); lacks depth in credit risk, liquidity, or compliance architecture
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong full-stack, distributed-systems, and craftsmanship credentials, plus emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling through recent work at re:cinq. However, the role demands an executive with a proven record of scaling teams to 30+, governing hybrid delivery models, and architecting production multi-agent AI in regulated fintech — areas where the resume shows limited or no direct evidence. Fit is closer to a senior/staff engineering profile than a CTO of an AI-native fintech scale-up.
